item.title:
RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 27min "I know 98 won't be good enough, I'll need plenty more"
Jack Kennedy believes he has n
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 27min "I know 98 won't be good enough, I'll need plenty more"
Jack Kennedy believes he has not yet done enough to be crowned Irish champion jump jockey for a second time and is hell-bent on adding more winners in the remainder of the season
Read with Racing Post+ De racingpost.com 1 1 1 1 mil
